page.content: As organizations increasingly prioritize sustainability, Linde plc is committed to achieving ambitious carbon footprint reduction targets while maintaining robust financial performance in the Chemicals & Materials sector. The data table presents a detailed overview of our initiatives, highlighting key metrics such as TotalRevenue and CAPEX.

page.content: Specifically, Scope1's TotalRevenue was reported at 100,000tCO2, reflecting our ongoing efforts in emissions management. Additionally, for CAPEX, we aim to allocate 50,000tCO2 towards critical projects, emphasizing our strategic investments in environmentally friendly technologies.

page.content: In the context of electronic materials revenue, our projections indicate a growth trajectory, with Q1 sales reaching 30M and a consistent upward trend expected throughout the fiscal year. Moreover, our NetIncome(CAD) stands at 12M, underscoring our financial resilience.

page.content: The coating and adhesive sales mix will be instrumental in driving overall TotalSales, which is anticipated to grow by 10%, supported by a focused strategy to enhance product offerings. As we advance towards achieving a targeted 7% growth rate, Linde remains dedicated to striking a balance between innovation and sustainability, reinforcing our position as a leader within the industry.
